description.unified: Attacks a random enemy and its nearby enemies 3 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and inflicting Stun for [1.8 sec->3 sec].

Creates a [Belladonna Seed->Seed of Belladonna] around the target for [7 sec->10 sec]. The seed deals ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies every [1 sec->2 sec], [reducing their healing received by 25% for 1 sec->increasing M.DMG the target takes by 30% and reducing Heal Rate by 30% for 5 sec].
Attacks enemies [within a wide frontal range of self->in a wide area in front] 6 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for [1.8 sec->3 sec].

Normal and Skill attacks inflicts Poison on a target, dealing a total of ??? continuous M.DMG and reducing [their healing received->Heal Rate] by 5% over 20 sec. Poison [stacks up to 5 times->can be stacked up to max 5 times]. [(added) If Lorraine dies, Poison effect on enemies will disappear.]

dark.unified: Recovers own Mana by 250 upon a Critical Hit.
The duration of the [status ailment->CC] on hit enemies increases by 30% for [ {1} ->5] sec.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1000->1] but DMG is [increased->boosted] by [80%->100%].

dark.unified: [Increases->Increases] Mana Cost by [1000->1] and dispels [beneficial->positive] effects [from->of] enemies within range.
If the target is a boss, increases DMG of Poison by [70%->x3].

description.unified: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0} [(removed) sec].
[Wrath of the Forest] [DMG is increased->DMG is increased] by {0}%. Upon [a->] Crit Hit on enemies with [5 or more->over 5] stacks of Poison, [reduces->skill] cooldown [is reduced->] by 4%.
[Poison] Poison effect [makes Poison effect irremovable->becomes irremovable] and [increases DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%->for the duration of Poison, target takes {0}% increased M.DMG]

dark.unified: At the [start->beginning] of [battle->each battle], [all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 10% for 90 sec. The damage increase stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled->immediately reduces all Skill Cooldown of self by 30% and increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 20% for 90 sec. DMG Boost effect stacks up to max 5 times and is irremovable].

description.unified: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to [poisoned enemies->enemies inflicted with Poison] every 7 sec[, reducing Magic Defense by {1}% for 10 sec, and increases their Magic Damage taken by {2}%->reducing M.DEF by {1}% and increasing M.DMG the target takes by {2}% for 10 sec].
